subcodes.first_line: If thy earthly habitation be laid waste, grieve thou not; may thy celestial mansion flourish! O bird of reality, if thy dusty nest be destroyed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر خانه ناسوتی ويران گشت محزون مباش قصر ملکوتی معمور باد ای مرغ حقيقت اگر آشيان خاکی خراب گرديد
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @growth of the Cause
